channel.title: Linux Cfg on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Linux Cfg on Memo

item.title: Compress initramfs
item.description: Commands # sudo vim /etc/initramfs-tools/initramfs.conf - MODULES=most + MODULES=dep - COMPRESS=lz4 + COMPRESS=xz sudo apt install xz-utils sudo update-initramfs -u -k all

item.title: Keymaps
item.description: System # Arch Linux Create custom key mapping # Get original key maps: sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/share/kbd/keymaps sudo dumpkeys | sudo tee /usr/local/share/kbd/keymaps/my-keymaps.map Change caps-lock into ctrl: - keycode 58 = Caps_Lock + keycode 58 = Control Create /etc/vconsole.conf: + KEYMAP=/usr/local/share/kbd/keymaps/my-keymaps.map

item.title: Japanese Input
item.description: System # Arch Linux Gnome Commands # Case 1: fcitx + mozc sudo pacman -S fcitx-mozc fcitx-im fcitx-configtool Case 2: fcitx5 + mozc sudo pacman -S fcitx5-mozc fcitx5-im fcitx5-configtool Create .pam_environment in user home directory: + GTK_IM_MODULE DEFAULT=fcitx + QT_IM_MODULE DEFAULT=fcitx + XMODIFIERS DEFAULT=\@im=fcitx + SDL_IM_MODULE DEFAULT=fcitx If mozc does not work, try the following command: gsettings set org.

item.title: L2TP IPsec
item.description: System # Arch Linux Gnome NetworkManager Commands # paru -S xl2tpd strongswan networkmanager-l2tp

item.title: Gnome configuration
item.description: Disable wayland # Edit /etc/gdm/custom.conf: - #WaylandEnable=false + WaylandEnable=false + DefaultSession=gnome-xorg.desktop Otherwise run /usr/lib/gdm-disable-wayland as root: sudo /usr/lib/gdm-disable-wayland WaylandEnable=false will be written into /run/gdm/custom.conf and it overrides /etc/gdm/custom.conf. Turn off alert # dconf write /org/gnome/desktop/sound/event-sounds "false"
